{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220314412680F3804A723F7BA1E0"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597318872638882584","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了一部分，感叹作者脑洞是真的大啊！逻辑也是真的强，你是怎么做到叙事清楚，又不混乱的，教教我，我想写清楚一件事都要东扯西扯好久的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768891143,"group_id":"7545724262577884222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个随心所欲的双鱼座，有点小叛逆，时而疯癫，时而文静。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+ai0eMaCKs28VZP/cwF5WuAMBYMKH2rBLkb/riEDUPx","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fd3ed1b18cea455487086a7ee102db27~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707923&x-signature=xudqEI1KRh9qgiX6XiyjXrKvAOs%3D","user_id":"1910286056172580","user_name":"小米很迷糊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1910286056172580","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545724262577884222","book_info":{"abstract":"本想走过三千世界，诸天影视，安静静做一个旁观者，看遍人间悲欢，观尽世事起落。
可当那些意难平一次次撞进心底，当那些遗憾与不甘在眼前反复上演，我终究无法再冷眼旁观。综影视世界，虐心剧情？改写！
遗憾结局？重写！
反派洗白，配角逆袭。
从此，诸天剧情，再不由天道执笔，不由原著定音。
抬手改写剧本，不按原剧走，逆天改命，只偏爱你一人，诸天世界，我执笔重写乾坤。
曲筱绡不必再等剧情施舍温柔，不必再盼结局手下留情。
乔楚生不必孤独遗憾终生，有人懂他、信他、陪他走到最后。
宫远徵不必一生困于执念与伤痛，不必在无人看见的角落独自凋零。
罗子君不必跌进深渊才学会成长，不必被生活逼到无路可退才幡然醒悟。
蒋南孙不必背负太多沉重，不必在风雨里独自硬撑，她值得被守护，值得被偏爱。
吴邪亦有他归属，不再孤身闯险，不再被宿命纠缠，有人与他并肩。
裴轸更是不必再承受所有误解与伤痛，他的温柔与坚守，终会被看见、被珍惜。
剧中无遗憾，人间皆欢喜。
而我，将带着这执笔改命的力量，一步步走过一个又一个世界，救该救的人，圆未圆的梦，让所有被辜负的，被错过的，被掩埋的，都在我的笔下，重获新生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/269e8d5b98bf654a9e6eeb54f4595fea~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"sunshine桑","author_id":"","book_id":"7545724262577884222","book_name":"综影视来串门","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8b090","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4479人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":247,"name":"医术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=247&name=医术&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7545724355892757054","read_count":"4479","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"435262"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"212","tags":"女频衍生,衍生,穿越,医术,综影视","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/269e8d5b98bf654a9e6eeb54f4595fea~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304481&x-signature=j%2FEhV9GHT6nGpdVq96DxnMXmQxo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3359744158096840","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"17"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220314412680F3804A723F7BA1E0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3761,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6190,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":95},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1768895047,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7545724262577884222","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":9,"score_text":"9人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"202603220314412680F3804A723F7BA1E0","message":"请求成功"}
